items.title: Overview
items.description: The onchain protocols PND ships for artists, and how this reference is organized.

items.title: Addresses
items.description: The shared singletons of each PND onchain protocol, with ABI and reference links.

items.title: Conventions
items.description: How to read examples, addresses, and terms across this reference.

items.title: Overview
items.description: What the PND Surface System is, its parts, and how this reference is organized.

items.title: Slots and modules
items.description: The renderer slot and the minter set on the token, plus the price-strategy slot inside the canonical minter.

items.title: Id modes
items.description: Sequential and pooled, the two token id assignment models, fixed at init.

items.title: Seed and provenance
items.description: The one stored per-token fact, the mint-time seed, and the provenance that derives from the id and the Minted event.

items.title: Types
items.description: The shared enums and structs in SurfaceTypes.sol, the data-only surface with no ABI functions of its own.

items.title: Surface
items.description: Sequential-id ERC721 collection: the token core of the PND Surface System.

items.title: SurfaceFactory
items.description: Deploys one [Surface](/docs/surface/contracts/surface) collection per call as an EIP-1167 clone of a fixed implementation: no proxy admin, no upgrade path.

items.title: FixedPriceMinter
items.description: Fixed-price minter for a sequential [Surface](/docs/surface/contracts/surface) collection, deployed as one EIP-1167 clone per collection.

items.title: DefaultRenderer
items.description: The built-in renderer for [Surface](/docs/surface/contracts/surface).

items.title: RenderAssets
items.description: Registry of static display assets for renderers: each collection's cover image, per-token captures (thumbnails of rendered output), and a capture template resolved per token id.

items.title: ScriptyRenderer
items.description: A forkable [IRenderer](/docs/surface/contracts/i-renderer) template for script-based generative work, assembled onchain through ScriptyBuilderV2.

items.title: IPriceStrategy
items.description: IPriceStrategy is the interface a contract implements to occupy the price slot inside a collection's minter, the optional pricing module on the canonical [FixedPriceMinter](/docs/surface/contracts/fixed-price-minter) (see the [slots and modules](/docs/surface/concepts/four-slots) overview).

items.title: IRenderer
items.description: IRenderer is the interface a contract implements to occupy a collection's renderer slot, the token's one swappable presentation slot (see [slots and modules](/docs/surface/concepts/four-slots)) on the [Surface](/docs/surface/contracts/surface) core.

items.title: ISurfaceView
items.description: ISurfaceView is the read surface a collection exposes for its [renderer](/docs/surface/contracts/i-renderer), a [price strategy](/docs/surface/contracts/i-price-strategy), and any minter to read without depending on the full [Surface](/docs/surface/contracts/surface) ABI.

items.title: IPreviewRenderer
items.description: An optional extension a renderer implements to render the output for a caller-supplied seed with no token existing.

items.title: Deploy a collection
items.description: Call the factory to deploy an owned, immutable Surface clone wired to a canonical minter in one transaction.

items.title: Mint
items.description: Minting through the canonical FixedPriceMinter, price resolution, sale windows, gates, and the reverts to handle.

items.title: Write a minter
items.description: Implement a minter, get authorized via setMinter, and mint through the token's minter-gated mintTo or mintToId.

items.title: Write a price strategy
items.description: Implement IPriceStrategy's view-only priceOf, install it on the minter with setPriceStrategy, and two worked examples.

items.title: Write a renderer
items.description: Implement IRenderer against ISurfaceView, the bundled renderers, and how renderer locking works.

items.title: Access control
items.description: Every state-changing function in the Surface contracts and who may call it.

items.title: Errors index
items.description: Every custom error in the Surface contracts, its contract, and the condition that raises it.

items.title: Events index
items.description: Every event the Surface contracts emit, grouped by contract.

items.title: Injection convention
items.description: How a generative work's code receives its token context, onchain and off, and the determinism rules that make a preview the render.

items.title: Overview
items.description: The PND Sovereign Auction House: a per-owner, onchain English-auction house for any ERC721.

items.title: Auction lifecycle
items.description: The full path an auction takes: create and escrow, bid, extend, end, or cancel, plus refunds and the fee math.

items.title: SovereignAuctionHouse
items.description: An onchain English auction house for ERC721 tokens, denominated in ETH.

items.title: SovereignAuctionHouseFactory
items.description: SovereignAuctionHouseFactory deploys one [SovereignAuctionHouse](/docs/auctions/contracts/sovereign-auction-house) per owner as an immutable EIP-1167 clone of a fixed implementation: no proxy admin, no upgrade path, what deploys is what runs.

items.title: Deploy an auction house
items.description: Call the factory to deploy your own per-owner auction house, and predict its address ahead of time.

items.title: Run an auction
items.description: The seller flow: approve the NFT, create one or many auctions, adjust the reserve, cancel, and end.

items.title: Bid and settle
items.description: The bidder flow: read the minimum, place a bid, handle being outbid and refunds, and settle a finished auction.

items.title: Access control
items.description: Every state-changing function in the Auctions contracts and who may call it.

items.title: Errors index
items.description: Every custom error in the Auctions contracts, its contract, and the condition that raises it.

items.title: Events index
items.description: Every event the Auctions contracts emit, grouped by contract.

items.title: Overview
items.description: Catalog, a general onchain artist registry where an address publishes pointers to its work.

items.title: Catalog
items.description: An immutable public registry where an artist address publishes onchain pointers to its work.

items.title: Access control
items.description: Every state-changing function in the Catalog contracts and who may call it.

items.title: Errors index
items.description: Every custom error in the Catalog contracts, its contract, and the condition that raises it.

items.title: Events index
items.description: Every event the Catalog contracts emit, grouped by contract.

items.title: ABIs and the protocol manifest
items.description: Where integrators get machine-readable data: served ABI files, the @pin/abi package, the protocol manifest, llms.txt, and the docs search index.

items.title: AI agents
items.description: Where to start as an agent or integrator: the manifest, llms.txt, per-contract ABIs, and how to discover per-owner clones through each factory.
